records.question: Which buildings named Floridan Hotel at 905 Franklin Street have exactly 17 floors, were tallest from 1926–1966, and are at least 204 feet tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.floors = 17 AND building.name = 'Floridan Hotel' AND building.street_address = '905 Franklin Street' AND building.years_as_tallest = '1926–1966' AND building.height_feet >= 204
records.pred_sql:
SELECT building.building_id
FROM building
WHERE building.floors = 17
  AND building.Name = 'Floridan Hotel'
  AND building.Street_address = '905 Franklin Street'
  AND building.Years_as_tallest = '1926–1966'
  AND building.Height_feet >= 204

records.question: Which buildings at least 204 feet tall are associated with Private institutions where the team is Jimmies?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE institution.type = 'Private' AND building.height_feet >= 204 AND institution.team = 'Jimmies'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.building_id
FROM building b
JOIN institution i ON b.building_id = i.building_id
WHERE b.Height_feet >= 204
  AND i.type = 'Private'
  AND i.team = 'Jimmies'

records.question: Which buildings named One Tampa City Center have at most 39 floors, are at least 537 feet tall, and are associated with institutions founded no later than 1927 that have at most 616 students and whose team is exactly Warriors?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.floors <= 39 AND institution.enrollment <= 616 AND building.name = 'One Tampa City Center' AND institution.founded <= 1927.0 AND institution.team = 'Warriors' AND building.height_feet >= 537
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.building_id
FROM building b
JOIN institution i ON b.building_id = i.building_id
WHERE b.floors <= 39
  AND b.Name = 'One Tampa City Center'
  AND b.Height_feet >= 537
  AND i.enrollment <= 616
  AND i.founded <= 1927.0
  AND i.team = 'Warriors'

records.question: Which buildings have at least 22 floors but are no more than 280 feet tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.height_feet <= 280 AND building.floors >= 22
records.pred_sql:
SELECT building.building_id
FROM building
WHERE building.Height_feet <= 280 AND building.Floors >= 22

records.question: Which buildings named Park Tower are located at 400 North Tampa Street and belong to private institutions in the CalPac conference founded in 1927 or later with enrollment of at most 650?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.street_address = '400 North Tampa Street' AND institution.type = 'Private' AND institution.enrollment <= 650 AND building.name = 'Park Tower' AND institution.primary_conference = 'CalPac' AND institution.founded >= 1927.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT building.building_id
FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.Street_address = '400 North Tampa Street'
  AND building.Name = 'Park Tower'
  AND institution.type = 'Private'
  AND institution.enrollment <= 650
  AND institution.Primary_Conference = 'CalPac'
  AND institution.founded >= 1927.0

records.question: Which buildings have at least 12 floors and are associated with an institution?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.floors >= 12
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT building.building_id
FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.floors >= 12

records.question: Which buildings that were the tallest exactly during 1966–1972 have a height of at most 280 feet?

WHERE building.height_feet <= 280 AND building.years_as_tallest = '1966–1972'
